File: tools\evidence_tool.py (157 lines total)
   1 | """Evidence retrieval tools for phased analysis."""
   2 | 
   3 | from __future__ import annotations
   4 | 
   5 | from dataclasses import dataclass
   6 | from typing import Any
   7 | 
   8 | from context.evidence import EvidenceLedger
   9 | from tools.artifact_tool import ArtifactStoreRef
  10 | from tools.base import BaseTool, ToolResult
  11 | 
  12 | 
  13 | @dataclass
  14 | class EvidenceLedgerRef:
  15 |     """Mutable reference used to bind tools to the active agent evidence ledger."""
  16 | 
  17 |     ledger: EvidenceLedger | None = None
  18 | 
  19 | 
  20 | class EvidenceListTool(BaseTool):
  21 |     def __init__(self, ledger_ref: EvidenceLedgerRef) -> None:
  22 |         self._ledger_ref = ledger_ref
  23 | 
  24 |     @property
  25 |     def name(self) -> str:
  26 |         return "evidence_list"
  27 | 
  28 |     @property
  29 |     def description(self) -> str:
  30 |         return "List captured evidence records and phase summaries from the current run."
  31 | 
  32 |     @property
  33 |     def parameters_schema(self) -> dict[str, Any]:
  34 |         return {
  35 |             "type": "object",
  36 |             "properties": {
  37 |                 "phase": {"type": "string", "description": "Optional phase filter such as inspect or verify."},
  38 |                 "limit": {"type": "integer", "description": "Maximum evidence rows to return.", "default": 10},
  39 |             },
  40 |         }
  41 | 
  42 |     def execute(self, params: dict[str, Any]) -> ToolResult:
  43 |         ledger = self._ledger_ref.ledger
  44 |         if ledger is None:
  45 |             return ToolResult(success=True, output="No evidence ledger is attached.")
  46 |         phase = str(params.get("phase", "")).strip()
  47 |         limit = max(1, int(params.get("limit", 10) or 10))
  48 |         records = ledger.records
  49 |         if phase:
  50 |             records = [record for record in records if record.phase == phase]
  51 |         records = records[:limit]
  52 |         if not records:
  53 |             return ToolResult(success=True, output="No evidence captured yet.")
  54 | 
  55 |         lines = ["Evidence records:"]
  56 |         for record in records:
  57 |             location = record.path or "(no path)"
  58 |             if record.range_text:
  59 |                 location = f"{location} {record.range_text}"
  60 |             lines.append(
  61 |                 f"- {record.evidence_id} | phase={record.phase} | tool={record.tool_name} | {location} | artifact={record.artifact_id or '(none)'}"
  62 |             )
  63 |         summaries = ledger.phase_summaries
  64 |         if phase:
  65 |             summaries = [summary for summary in summaries if summary.phase == phase]
  66 |         if summaries:
  67 |             lines.append("Phase summaries:")
  68 |             for summary in summaries[: max(1, min(limit, 5))]:
  69 |                 lines.append(
  70 |                     f"- {summary.phase} | evidence={len(summary.evidence_ids)} | claims={len(summary.claims)} | recommended_reads={len(summary.recommended_verification_reads)}"
  71 |                 )
  72 |         return ToolResult(success=True, output="\n".join(lines))
  73 | 
  74 | 
  75 | class EvidenceGetTool(BaseTool):
  76 |     def __init__(self, ledger_ref: EvidenceLedgerRef) -> None:
  77 |         self._ledger_ref = ledger_ref
  78 | 
  79 |     @property
  80 |     def name(self) -> str:
  81 |         return "evidence_get"
  82 | 
  83 |     @property
  84 |     def description(self) -> str:
  85 |         return "Get one evidence record or phase summary by id from the current run."
  86 | 
  87 |     @property
  88 |     def parameters_schema(self) -> dict[str, Any]:
  89 |         return {
  90 |             "type": "object",
  91 |             "properties": {
  92 |                 "evidence_id": {"type": "string", "description": "Evidence id such as ev_ab12cd34."},
  93 |                 "phase": {"type": "string", "description": "Phase summary name such as inspect or verify."},
  94 |             },
  95 |         }
  96 | 
  97 |     def execute(self, params: dict[str, Any]) -> ToolResult:
  98 |         ledger = self._ledger_ref.ledger
  99 |         if ledger is None:
 100 |             return ToolResult(success=False, output="", error="No evidence ledger is attached.")
 101 | 
 102 |         evidence_id = str(params.get("evidence_id", "")).strip()
 103 |         phase = str(params.get("phase", "")).strip()
 104 |         if evidence_id:
 105 |             for record in ledger.records:
 106 |                 if record.evidence_id == evidence_id:
 107 |                     return ToolResult(success=True, output=record.reference_text())
 108 |             return ToolResult(success=False, output="", error=f"Evidence not found: {evidence_id}")
 109 |         if phase:
 110 |             summary = ledger.phase_summary_for(phase)
 111 |             if summary is None:
 112 |                 return ToolResult(success=False, output="", error=f"Phase summary not found: {phase}")
 113 |             return ToolResult(success=True, output=summary.prompt_text())
 114 |         return ToolResult(success=False, output="", error="evidence_id or phase is required")
 115 | 
 116 | 
 117 | class ArtifactSearchTool(BaseTool):
 118 |     def __init__(self, store_ref: ArtifactStoreRef) -> None:
 119 |         self._store_ref = store_ref
 120 | 
 121 |     @property
 122 |     def name(self) -> str:
 123 |         return "artifact_search"
 124 | 
 125 |     @property
 126 |     def description(self) -> str:
 127 |         return "Search raw evidence artifacts by id, tool name, summary, or content."
 128 | 
 129 |     @property
 130 |     def parameters_schema(self) -> dict[str, Any]:
 131 |         return {
 132 |             "type": "object",
 133 |             "properties": {
 134 |                 "query": {"type": "string", "description": "Search text to match against artifact summaries or content."},
 135 |                 "limit": {"type": "integer", "description": "Maximum matches to return.", "default": 5},
 136 |             },
 137 |             "required": ["query"],
 138 |         }
 139 | 
 140 |     def execute(self, params: dict[str, Any]) -> ToolResult:
 141 |         store = self._store_ref.store
 142 |         if store is None:
 143 |             return ToolResult(success=True, output="No artifact store is attached.")
 144 |         query = str(params.get("query", "")).strip()
 145 |         if not query:
 146 |             return ToolResult(success=False, output="", error="query is required")
 147 |         limit = max(1, int(params.get("limit", 5) or 5))
 148 |         matches = store.search(query, limit=limit)
 149 |         if not matches:
 150 |             return ToolResult(success=True, output=f"No artifacts matched query: {query}")
 151 |         lines = [f"Artifact matches for: {query}"]
 152 |         for artifact in matches:
 153 |             summary = artifact.summary.splitlines()[0] if artifact.summary else "(no summary)"
 154 |             lines.append(
 155 |                 f"- {artifact.artifact_id} | {artifact.tool_name} | ~{artifact.token_count} tokens | {summary}"
 156 |             )
 157 |         return ToolResult(success=True, output="\n".join(lines))
